blocks.text: `internal/agentbridge/bridge` is the C4 provider-runtime provider-neutral library entrypoint. Callers inject adapter lists and process ports; bridge composes a single provider run.

items: Create an adapter registry and reject duplicate/empty provider names.
Call `Detect(ctx)` and return provider capability snapshots in stable provider-name order.
Materialize SaaS assignment `agent_instruction` into provider-specific runtime instruction surfaces.
Attach a one-run protocol driver when the adapter implements `ProtocolDriverProvider`.
Return a session handle facade while preserving adapter `DroppedArgs` and `TempFiles` at the session boundary.

blocks.text: `bridge` does not own scheduling, task claim, EventIngestor append, workdir preparation, policy decision, provider-specific parsing, or persistence.
